scripts.build:shared-packages: npm run build:shared-config && npm run build:auth-core && npm run build:observability-core && npm run build:workflow-core && npm run build:queue-contracts && npm run build:contracts && npm run build:backend-core
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared-packages && node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/api run start:dev
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build:shared-packages && node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/worker run start:dev
scripts.dev:dashboard: npm run build:shared-packages && node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/dashboard run dev
scripts.start:api: npm run build:shared-packages && node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/api run start
scripts.start:worker: npm run build:shared-packages && node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/worker run start
scripts.start:dashboard: npm run build:shared-packages && NODE_ENV=production node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/dashboard run start
scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared-packages && npm --workspace @aicp/api run build
scripts.build:worker: npm run build:shared-packages && npm --workspace @aicp/worker run build
scripts.build:dashboard: npm run build:shared-packages && NODE_ENV=production node scripts/run-with-root-env.mjs npm --workspace @aicp/dashboard run build
scripts.lint:structure: node scripts/check-code-shape.mjs && node scripts/check-module-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/check-architecture-fitness.mjs
scripts.lint: npm run lint:workspaces && npm run lint:structure
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared-packages && npm run typecheck:workspaces
scripts.test: npm run build:shared-packages && npm run test --workspaces
